mapper.select: /* usimChgHstMapper.selectUsimChgList */ SELECT DISTINCT CONTRACT_NUM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST WHERE ICC_ID IS NOT NULL AND EVNT_CHANGE_DATE BETWEEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE-1,'YYYYMMDD') || '000000' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE-1,'YYYYMMDD') || '235959'
mapper.insert: /* usimChgHstMapper.insertUsimChgHst */ INSERT INTO MSP_USIM_CHG_HST SELECT DISTINCT CONTRACT_NUM, EVNT_CHANGE_DATE, USIM_MODNM, USIM_MODID, ICC_ID, SYSDATE FROM ( SELECT CONTRACT_NUM, EVNT_CHANGE_DATE, USIM_MODNM, USIM_MODID, ICC_ID, LAG(ICC_ID) OVER (PARTITION BY CONTRACT_NUM ORDER BY EVNT_CHANGE_DATE) AS PREV_ICC_ID FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST WHERE ICC_ID IS NOT NULL AND CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} ) WHERE ICC_ID != PREV_ICC_ID AND EVNT_CHANGE_DATE BETWEEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE-1,'YYYYMMDD') || '000000' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE-1,'YYYYMMDD') || '235959' ORDER BY EVNT_CHANGE_DATE ASC
